global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream content with a cancellation option.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and energetic base.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo features bold, modern typography in white, prominently displayed at the top center.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A large, bold text in black stating 'Stream the hype' is centered within a white rectangular box.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two simple geometric shapes, a circle and a square, are lightly outlined in the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Cancellation notice
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message reads 'Cancel anytime' in a clean, sans-serif font.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small 'UGC' label in white is positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Claim reward' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A small circle is placed near the top left, complementing the overall geometric theme.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, BingeLayer logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BingeLayer, Stream the hype, Cancel anytime, Claim reward, UGC
